channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-06-13: 3 commits across 1 repos
item.description:
Daily digest — 2026-06-13

1 repo active, 3 total commits.

  • metacheck: 3 commits on 2026-06-13

View full dashboard

item.title: metacheck — 3 commits on 2026-06-13
item.description:
scienceverse/metacheck — 2026-06-13

In the 'scienceverse/metacheck' project, work was done to update the TUE server to use GROBID version 0.9.0. Additionally, a vignette was added to describe all references, and the `stat_effect_size` function was improved to detect tests via `extract_eq()` and add implied sample sizes, addressing issue #308. These changes aim to enhance the project's functionality and documentation.

3 commits on 2026-06-13:

  • [other] [dev] 9a007d9 TUE server uses 0.9.0 GROBID now as well — Lakens
  • [feat] [dev] 920c2d9 Add vignette describing all references — Lakens
  • [feat] [dev] 97bb1c1 stat_effect_size: detect tests via extract_eq(); add implied sample sizes (#308) — Lakens

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-06-12: 3 commits across 1 repos

item.title: metacheck — 3 commits on 2026-06-12
item.description:
scienceverse/metacheck — 2026-06-12

In the 'scienceverse/metacheck' project, work was done on cleaning up the website, updating mocking functionality, and adding a TUE grobid server. These changes, all made by Lisa DeBruine, suggest improvements to the project's online presence and backend functionality. Specifically, the addition of the TUE grobid server may enhance the project's ability to parse and extract information from scientific documents.

3 commits on 2026-06-12:

  • [refactor] [dev] f495921 clean up website — Lisa DeBruine
  • [other] [dev] a6c4cd3 mocking updates — Lisa DeBruine
  • [feat] [main] d85d73f Add TUE grobid server — Lisa DeBruine

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-06-11: 7 commits across 1 repos
item.description:
Daily digest — 2026-06-11

1 repo active, 7 total commits.

  • metacheck: 7 commits on 2026-06-11

View full dashboard

item.title: metacheck — 7 commits on 2026-06-11
item.description:
scienceverse/metacheck — 2026-06-11

In the 'scienceverse/metacheck' project, work was done on updating and improving the Shiny app, including creating two new apps: one for generating beginner reports and another for demonstrating the tool. The updates also included adding tests for the Shiny app and fixing failing tests, such as those related to 'stat_effect_size'. Additionally, various fixes and improvements were made, including merging updates from the 'dev' branch and 'shiny_update' pull request.

7 commits on 2026-06-11:

  • [other] [dev] f0f26ef Shiny app updates and related fixes — Lisa DeBruine
  • [chore] [dev] 1c20e09 Merge pull request #304 from scienceverse/shiny_update — Lisa DeBruine
  • [other] [dev] e1cc0d4 Merge branch 'dev' into shiny_update — Lisa DeBruine
  • [feat] [dev] ac67944 substantial shiny update. Made 2 apps, one to create a report for beginners, one to demo the tool. Added tests for the shiny app, as requested. Followed all Lisa's suggestions for improvement. Passes all old and new tests, and manual testing of both apps. — Lakens
  • [fix] [dev] ea6db80 add fix stat_effect_size test — Lakens
  • [fix] [dev] 0678bb2 fix failing stat_effect_size tests (and pubpeer mock) — Lakens
  • [feat] [main] fe37300 add email — Lakens

item.title: metacheck — 5 commits on 2026-06-10
item.description:
scienceverse/metacheck — 2026-06-10

In the 'scienceverse/metacheck' project, work was done on updating the report template, importing updates from Grobid, and fixing bibliography titles. Additionally, two pull requests (#303 and #306) were merged, incorporating changes from the 'effect_size_d' and 'dev' branches. These updates suggest improvements to the project's reporting and citation functionality.

5 commits on 2026-06-10:

  • [feat] [dev] 8cc2132 added example report with new template — Lisa DeBruine
  • [chore] [dev] 76e5bea Merge pull request #303 from scienceverse/effect_size_d — Lisa DeBruine
  • [fix] [dev] 865885a bib title fix — Lisa DeBruine
  • [other] [dev] 4ae6924 grobid import updates — Lisa DeBruine
  • [chore] [main] 875a2af Merge pull request #306 from scienceverse/dev — Lisa DeBruine

item.title: metacheck — 2 commits on 2026-06-09
item.description:
scienceverse/metacheck — 2026-06-09

In the 'scienceverse/metacheck' project, improvements were made to imports by Lisa DeBruine. Additionally, Lakens updated the GROBID server address to TU/e, which likely refers to Eindhoven University of Technology. These changes suggest that the project is focused on refining its infrastructure and dependencies.

2 commits on 2026-06-09:

  • [other] [dev] a9ed9f4 import improvements — Lisa DeBruine
  • [other] [dev] a66fbea update GROBID server address to TU/e — Lakens

item.title: metacheck — 1 commit on 2026-06-08
item.description:
scienceverse/metacheck — 2026-06-08

In the 'scienceverse/metacheck' project, work was done to update the application layout. Specifically, the update allows for the 'skip_online' feature to bypass querying online repositories, enhancing the app's functionality. This change was implemented by Lakens on 2026-06-08.

1 commit on 2026-06-08:

  • [other] [dev] 21ef9ad update app layout. Now allows 'skip_online' to not query any online repositories — Lakens

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-06-07: 2 commits across 1 repos
item.description:

1 repo active, 2 total commits.

  • metacheck: 2 commits on 2026-06-07

View full dashboard

item.title: metacheck — 2 commits on 2026-06-07
item.description:
scienceverse/metacheck — 2026-06-07

In the 'scienceverse/metacheck' project, work was done on a new version of a Shiny app, focusing on ease of use and GDPR/privacy compliance. The app's main tab now allows for single upload and report generation. Additionally, the report text was updated, and statistical effect size computations were expanded to include coherence checks where possible.

2 commits on 2026-06-07:

  • [feat] [dev] a774779 new version shiny app, focussed on ease of use (main tab is single upload > report) and GDPR And privacy of information. 2 minor fixes in other packages — Lakens
  • [other] [dev] d2f5c1d Updated report text, and expanded stat effect size to also compute if effect sizes are coherent, where possible. — Lakens

item.title: metacheck — 8 commits on 2026-06-05
item.description:
scienceverse/metacheck — 2026-06-05

In the 'scienceverse/metacheck' project, work was done on test maintenance and configuration, including skipping a failing test on CRAN, adding mocking for a test that fails on Continuous Integration (CI), and removing 'httest'. Additionally, updates were made to the 'test-coverage.yaml' file and a new 'static.yml' file was created. These changes were merged through several pull requests.

8 commits on 2026-06-05:

  • [test] [dev] 33077a1 skip failing test on cran — Lisa DeBruine
  • [feat] [dev] fbed67b add mocking of test that fails on CI — Lisa DeBruine
  • [other] [dev] c34339d removed httptest — Lisa DeBruine
  • [test] [main] c5226cb Update test-coverage.yaml — Lisa DeBruine
  • [chore] [main] def836e Merge pull request #298 from scienceverse/dev — Lisa DeBruine
  • [chore] [main] 4bb7103 Merge pull request #297 from scienceverse/dev — Lisa DeBruine
  • [other] [main] ff8328b Create static.yml — Lisa DeBruine
  • [chore] [main] a1d7e77 Merge pull request #296 from scienceverse/dev — Lisa DeBruine

item.title: metacheck — 10 commits on 2026-06-04
item.description:
scienceverse/metacheck — 2026-06-04

In the 'scienceverse/metacheck' project, work was done on preparing a beta version release, including updating the README.md file and merging multiple pull requests from the dev branch. Additionally, fixes were made to the prereg_check function and the package documentation was updated for release using pkgdown. The project also transitioned from an alpha to a beta version.

10 commits on 2026-06-04:

  • [other] [dev] 6b96621 prereg_check fixes — Lisa DeBruine
  • [chore] [dev] c8aafa6 pkgdown release version — Lisa DeBruine
  • [other] [dev] 51514b6 update alpha->beta and stop auto tests — Lisa DeBruine
  • [chore] [dev] f44fec7 beta version! — Lisa DeBruine
  • [chore] [main] 09eb2d6 Merge pull request #295 from scienceverse/dev — Lisa DeBruine
  • [chore] [main] 194f336 Merge pull request #294 from scienceverse/dev — Lisa DeBruine
  • [chore] [main] 7fbd052 Merge pull request #293 from scienceverse/dev — Lisa DeBruine
  • [docs] [main] d8d1cdf Update README.md — Lisa DeBruine
  • [docs] [main] df99f3c Update README.md — Lisa DeBruine
  • [chore] [main] b047902 Merge pull request #292 from scienceverse/dev — Lisa DeBruine
